name: Whitehawk Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Whitehawk Therapeutics is a clinical-stage oncology therapeutics company focused on developing next-generation antibody drug conjugates (ADCs) targeting PTK7, MUC16, and SEZ6 for cancer indications. It has divested its only approved product, FYARRO, and does not currently generate revenue from product sales.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage oncology therapeutics company applying advanced technologies to established tumor biology that are intended to efficiently deliver improved cancer treatments.

catalysts.event: Data readouts from Phase 1 trials for HWK-007 and HWK-016
catalysts.sentence: We expect data readouts in the first half of 2027 for each trial.
We anticipate submitting an IND for HWK-206 for the treatment of small cell lung cancer ("SCLC") and neuroendocrine tumors (NETs) in mid-2026.
